title: Resolution Approving and Adopting Municipal Development Council Resolution, Dated June 26, 2020, Resolution No. 2020-07, Resolution Realigning the Amount of Two Million Pesos (P2M) for the Purchase of One (1) Unit Brand New Diesel Tractor to Be Taken From the Appropriation for the Construction/ Rehabilitation/ Improvement of Tourism Information Center and Go-negosyo Center Under the 20% Municipal Development Fund Cy 2020 Current Appropriations and Approving the Same. (author: Councilor Geronimo
